title: Empowering Women in Finance: SEC/NCMI Launches Capital Market Literacy Program for Women - FinancialEDGE
description: The Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), in its commitment to developing the capital market and increasing participation among Nigerians, is set to train selected women in capital market literacy through its training arm, the Nigerian Capital Market Institute. SEC Director General, Dr. Emomotimi Agama, disclosed this initiative during a meeting with the Minister of Women
html: The Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), in its commitment to developing the capital market and increasing participation among Nigerians, is set to train selected women in capital market literacy through its training arm, the Nigerian Capital Market Institute.
